title: 5G Services Market Projected to Reach USD 2271.25 Billion by 2032 | SNS Insider
author: N/A
description: The 5G Services Market is expected to grow significantly, reaching $2.27 trillion by 2032, driven by the rising demand for high-speed internet, low latency, and enhanced network capabilities across industries. The market is dominated by enterprises, with the entertainment and immersive tech segment leading the applications. Asia Pacific currently leads the market, while North America is set to experience the fastest growth.

title: KT Corp shares neutral after Goldman Sachs rating change By Investing.com - Investing.com Australia
author: Natashya Angelica
description: Goldman Sachs downgraded KT Corp from Buy to Neutral, citing expectations of stagnant revenue growth in its traditional telecom operations and subsidiaries, despite anticipated stronger performance in AI and new business segments.

title: 3 Wireless Non-US Stocks Set to Ride on Positive Industry Trends
author: Supriyo Bose
description: The fast-track 5G rollout and solid wireless traction should help the Zacks Wireless Non-US industry thrive despite short-term headwinds. TIMB, SKM and KT are well-positioned to make the most of the demand for seamless connectivity solutions.
